reviews.comment:
Los mejores Sándwiches de jamón y queso de la ruta 3…. son para compartir.

Como sugerencia:
buffet ya podría modernizarse un poco… hace 20 años que está igual.

(Translated by Google)
The best ham and cheese sandwiches on Route 3... are meant to be shared.

As a suggestion:
The buffet could use a bit of an update... it's been the same for 20 years.
